brand-story-img.query: The Velmora Narrative Velmora was born from a desire to bridge the gap between costume jewelry and fine investment pieces. Each piece is designed in our London studio, prioritizing sustainable materials and artisanal craftsmanship. woman wearing jewelry editorial portrait
